level.setting: An ominous, decaying cathedral suspended in a void dimension.

pickup.name: Frozen Heart Amulet
pickup.effect: Grants frost resistance

encounters.trigger: Burning the tapestry reveals a hidden stairwell leading to the Iron Crypts.

pickup.name: Sun-Touched Chalice
pickup.effect: Reflects magical attacks

encounters.trigger: The Golem shatters, triggering a pressure plate that opens the gate to the Altar of Void.

encounters.hazard: Void rifts that damage health over time.

pickup.name: Ancient Relic Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the Boss chamber barrier

encounters.trigger: The Sentinel dies, causing the altar to collapse and revealing the path to the Boss throne room.

boss.name: Obsidian Lich
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Amulet to freeze the Lich's core before the clock runs out.

level.objective: Purge the temple of its dark corruption.

level.setting: A magical, gravity-defying forest where flora is made of confections.

encounters.hazard: Sticky floor patches that slow movement.

pickup.name: Sparkling Honey Jar
pickup.effect: Increases beast speed and attracts swarms.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Golem causes a bridge of licorice to extend toward the Whispering Willows.

pickup.name: Ever-Cold Frostberry
pickup.effect: Adds frost damage to beast attacks.

encounters.trigger: The Sprite drops a golden key that unlocks the gate to the Glimmering Grotto.

encounters.hazard: Unstable crystals falling from the ceiling.

pickup.name: Sun-Kissed Petal
pickup.effect: Fully restores beast companion health.

encounters.trigger: The Turtle rolls away to reveal the entrance to the Boss Chamber.

boss.name: The Great Fluff-Dragon
boss.victory_condition: Calm the dragon using the petal so it releases the Starlight Acorn.

level.objective: Retrieve the Starlight Acorn from the Guardian of the Grotto.
level.reward: The Starlight Acorn and a permanent increase in beast companion size.

pickup.name: Vial of Holy Light
pickup.effect: Increases melee damage against undead.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel shatters the seal on the inner crypt door.

pickup.name: Sun-Touched Amulet
pickup.effect: Provides immunity to necrotic aura.

encounters.trigger: Slaying the Stalker dissipates the magical shadows blocking the altar room.

pickup.name: Soul-Binding Chain
pickup.effect: Prevents the boss from teleporting.

encounters.trigger: Eliminating the Zealot summons the Lich Lord from the sarcophagus.

boss.name: Lich Lord Malakor
boss.victory_condition: Anchor the Lich to the physical realm and destroy his phylactery.

level.objective: Purge the desecrated crypt of the Lich Lord's presence.

level.setting: An ancient floating palace suspended in a void of fractured reality.

pickup.name: Crystalline Lens
pickup.effect: Reveals hidden traps and true forms of enemies.

encounters.trigger: Opening the forbidden tome releases a psychic pulse that reveals the path to the Arcane Gallery.

pickup.name: Sun-Touched Seal
pickup.effect: Burns through magical barriers and weakens divine armor.

encounters.trigger: Shattering the portrait echoes throughout the halls, alerting the Sentinel of the Void.

pickup.name: Chronos Key
pickup.effect: Freezes time for enemies for 3 seconds.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel causes the central altar to manifest the ultimate boss.

boss.name: Shadow Monarch
boss.victory_condition: Use the Chronos Key to stabilize the Monarch's phase-shifting form then strike the core.

level.objective: Seal the rift of shadows by defeating the Shadow Monarch.
level.reward: The Eye of Eternity and absolute mastery over shadows.

level.setting: An ancient, tranquil forest sanctuary bathed in perpetual moonlight.

pickup.name: Dewdrop Gem
pickup.effect: Grants frost enchantment to attacks

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Wisp clears the mist blocking the path to the Sunken Grotto

pickup.name: Sun-Kissed Petal
pickup.effect: Increases health regeneration

encounters.trigger: Crushing the crawler reveals a hidden key to the Ancient Gate

pickup.name: Celestial Focus
pickup.effect: Weakens boss armor

encounters.trigger: Destroying the sentinel unlocks the Sanctum of Rest

boss.name: Twilight Warden
boss.victory_condition: Channel the power of the Celestial Focus to purify the Warden

level.objective: Restore peace to the silent sanctuary by pacifying the corrupted guardians.
level.reward: The Title of Grove Keeper and the Eternal Staff

level.setting: A fractured dimension of unstable reality.

encounters.hazard: Crumbling stone pillars falling into the abyss.

pickup.name: Essence of Rage
pickup.effect: Increases damage by 20% for 10 seconds.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel shatters the bridge, dropping the player into the Pit of Echoes.

encounters.hazard: Floating debris that slows movement speed.

pickup.name: Stabilizing Amulet
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to gravity-based knockback.

encounters.trigger: Killing the Weaver collapses the cave walls, revealing the entrance to the Altar of Discord.

encounters.hazard: Unpredictable bolts of lightning striking random areas.

pickup.name: Crystalline Focus
pickup.effect: Absorbs the next incoming spell attack.

encounters.trigger: Shattering the Construct triggers the summoning ritual for the final boss.

boss.name: Lord of Entropy
boss.victory_condition: Use the Crystalline Focus to neutralize the boss's aura, then deliver the final strike.

level.objective: Destroy the source of chaotic energies before the realm collapses.

level.setting: An eerie, decaying necropolis shrouded in eternal night.

pickup.name: Bottled Banshee Scream
pickup.effect: Sonic damage that disrupts ethereal spirits.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the corpse reveals a glowing crypt key that opens the inner sanctum gate.

encounters.hazard: Floor tiles that erupt with pale blue flames.

pickup.name: Ritual Dagger
pickup.effect: Inflicts curse damage on divine entities.

encounters.trigger: The knight drops a ritual dagger needed to break the boss's protective seal.

encounters.hazard: Narrow bridge over a bottomless void.

pickup.name: Essence Vials
pickup.effect: Restores 20 health points.

encounters.trigger: The ghoul's death unlocks the heavy obsidian doors leading to the Boss arena.

boss.name: Lich of the Void
boss.victory_condition: Strike the Lich's core with the Ritual Dagger while it is stunned.

level.objective: Exorcise the Ancient Lich presiding over the haunted ruins.

level.setting: A desolate, war-torn forest lost to necrotic rot

encounters.hazard: Thick choking fog that obscures vision

pickup.name: Sun-Touched Arrowhead
pickup.effect: Deals radiant damage to dark entities

encounters.trigger: Stepping on a pile of brittle, calcified bones

pickup.name: Aether-Infused Oil
pickup.effect: Coats weapons to bypass incorporeal defenses

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the ancient silver key from the tower peak

encounters.hazard: Continuous falling debris from the crumbling ceiling

pickup.name: The Heart of the Grove
pickup.effect: Reveals the structural flaws in the boss armor

encounters.trigger: Inserting the silver key into the locking mechanism

boss.name: Void King
boss.victory_condition: Strike the exposed core after shattering the shield with the relic

level.objective: Purify the Blighted Heart at the center of the ruins
level.reward: The Ranger's Everlasting Quiver of Light

level.setting: A derelict research space station drifting near a black hole.

pickup.name: Conductive Gel
pickup.effect: Increases damage of electrical attacks against metallic surfaces.

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone triggers a power surge that unlocks the Cargo Bay door.

pickup.name: Liquid Nitrogen Canister
pickup.effect: Freezes mechanical joints to prevent movement.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the crawler activates the cargo elevator leading to the Core Chamber.

pickup.name: High-Pressure Valve
pickup.effect: Required to stabilize the core pressure.

encounters.trigger: Disabling the sentinel overrides the lockdown protocols for the Reactor Boss room.

boss.name: Malfunctioning AI Core
boss.victory_condition: Freeze the cooling pipes with the canister and strike the core with the welder.

level.objective: Stabilize the failing warp core before the station implodes.

level.setting: Abandoned research station drifting in deep space.

pickup.name: Stasis Battery
pickup.effect: Freezes mechanical systems in a localized radius.

encounters.trigger: Approaching the drone activates a proximity alert that unlocks the maintenance hatch.

pickup.name: Chronal Stabilizer
pickup.effect: Allows the user to phase through solid matter briefly.

encounters.trigger: Downloading data triggers a security lockdown that forces open the path to the reactor core.

pickup.name: Master Override Chip
pickup.effect: Disables the defense systems of the main boss.

encounters.trigger: The synthesizer defeat causes a power surge, opening the blast doors to the central command hub.

boss.name: Aetheris Prime
boss.victory_condition: Use the chip to expose the core and strike the final blow.

level.objective: Restore power to the desolate station by defeating the corrupted central AI.
level.reward: The ability to manipulate local time flow at will.

level.setting: A crumbling orbital research station caught in a localized magnetic storm

pickup.name: Conductive Core
pickup.effect: Increases electrical discharge range

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone triggers a power surge that unlocks the Security Airlock

pickup.name: Plasma Stabilizer
pickup.effect: Prevents overheating during storm channeling

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the bot reroutes power to the main reactor blast doors

pickup.name: Ionic Key
pickup.effect: Neutralizes boss shielding

encounters.trigger: Defeating the assassin triggers the final override sequence

boss.name: Archon Prime
boss.victory_condition: Stabilize the reactor core while surviving the Archon's onslaught

level.objective: Overload the reactor to reset the facility control grid

level.setting: An abandoned deep-space research vessel floating near a black hole.

pickup.name: Stabilization Core
pickup.effect: Enhances gadget durability.

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone unlocks the airlock to the Research Lab.

pickup.name: Overload Module
pickup.effect: Deals massive damage to sentient robotics.

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the bot causes a power surge that opens the Command Bridge.

pickup.name: Override Key
pickup.effect: Disables boss defensive shielding.

encounters.trigger: The turret's destruction powers up the main boss containment shield.

boss.name: The Singularity Core
boss.victory_condition: Use the Override Key to force a system shutdown.

level.objective: Infiltrate the derelict station and silence the sentient central processor.
level.reward: Control over the station's jump drive and advanced archival data.

level.setting: An abandoned orbital station drifting on the edge of a black hole.

pickup.name: Cryo-Core
pickup.effect: Deploys a freezing burst capable of slowing mechanical systems.

encounters.trigger: Opening the emergency bulkhead reveals a terminal that unlocks the security gate to the reactor sector.

pickup.name: EMP Pulse Emitter
pickup.effect: Short-circuits electrical shielding on armored bosses.

encounters.trigger: Destroying the bot causes a power surge that overrides the blast doors to the mainframe.

pickup.name: Void Stabilizer
pickup.effect: Nullifies the boss's intangible phase-shifting ability.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the assassin allows the player to extract the Master Encryption Key needed for the boss's containment unit.

boss.name: Prime Construct Aethelgard
boss.victory_condition: Deplete health while the stabilizer is active to prevent phase-regeneration.

level.objective: Disable the rogue AI construct before it initiates a planet-wide broadcast.
level.reward: The Master Encryption Key and an upgraded Shadowblade cloak.

level.setting: Abandoned orbital research facility drifting in a dark nebula.

pickup.name: Stabilizing Catalyst
pickup.effect: Increases elemental reaction potency.

encounters.trigger: Approaching the terminal activates the local defense drones.

encounters.hazard: Toxic gas leaking from overhead ventilation pipes.

pickup.name: Cryo-Freeze Solution
pickup.effect: Temporarily slows down biological entities.

encounters.trigger: Downloading the encrypted logs draws attention from the security grid.

encounters.hazard: Spontaneous gravity shifts causing falling debris.

pickup.name: Volatile Plasma Core
pickup.effect: Extremely effective against mechanical boss components.

encounters.trigger: Inserting the security keycard initiates a lockdown protocol, leading to the reactor.

boss.name: Prime Sentinel Prime
boss.victory_condition: Overload the core system during the boss's recharge phase.

level.objective: Deactivate the rogue AI controlling the deep-space station.
level.reward: Ancient AI knowledge core and extraction vessel access.

level.setting: An abandoned space carnival floating in a nebula.

pickup.name: Super-Slippery Oil
pickup.effect: Increases movement speed and creates slick floor patches.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the bot activates the Gravity Lift to the maintenance ducts.

pickup.name: Anti-Gravity Goo
pickup.effect: Allows player to jump thrice as high.

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the gremlin's power core unlocks the main control room.

pickup.name: Hyper-Speed Battery
pickup.effect: Charges the player's primary weapon for a finishing blow.

encounters.trigger: Disabling the turret sends a signal to open the Core Vault door.

boss.name: The Grand Overseer Droid
boss.victory_condition: Overload the boss circuit using the charged battery.

level.objective: Retrieve the Galactic Gumball Machine from the Core Vault.

level.setting: A floating modular station orbiting a quiet, gas-giant moon.

encounters.hazard: Flickering stasis fields that reduce movement speed.

pickup.name: Gravity Core
pickup.effect: Increases damage against aerial entities.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel releases a resonance pulse that unlocks the crystalline bridge.

encounters.hazard: Low-gravity zone that makes dodging difficult.

pickup.name: Sonic Resonator
pickup.effect: Vibrates non-organic matter, making it brittle.

encounters.trigger: The Osprey crashes, carving a path into the Lunar Spire.

pickup.name: Prism Fragment
pickup.effect: Absorbs light-based shielding.

encounters.trigger: The Shifter's defeat triggers the terminal, powering up the boss chamber gate.

boss.name: Architect of Silence
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the Architect's defensive shell with the Prism Fragment and deliver a final blow.

level.objective: Deactivate the core of the ancient space station.
level.reward: Control over the sector's gravitational ley lines.
